mapper.select: SELECT id, stock_id AS filmStockId, material_code AS materialCode, batch_no AS batchNo, roll_no AS rollNo, thickness, width, length, diameter, core_diameter AS coreDiameter, weight, area, quality_level AS qualityLevel, quality_status AS qcStatus, warehouse, location, supplier, purchase_order_no AS purchaseOrderNo, arrival_date AS arrivalDate, storage_date AS inboundDate, unit_price AS unitPrice, status, locked_by AS lockedBy, locked_time AS lockedTime, remark, create_by AS createBy, create_time AS createTime, update_by AS updateBy, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM film_stock_detail WHERE stock_id = #{filmStockId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, stock_id AS filmStockId, material_code AS materialCode, batch_no AS batchNo, roll_no AS rollNo, thickness, width, length, diameter, core_diameter AS coreDiameter, weight, area, quality_level AS qualityLevel, quality_status AS qcStatus, warehouse, location, supplier, purchase_order_no AS purchaseOrderNo, arrival_date AS arrivalDate, storage_date AS inboundDate, unit_price AS unitPrice, status, locked_by AS lockedBy, locked_time AS lockedTime, remark, create_by AS createBy, create_time AS createTime, update_by AS updateBy, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM film_stock_detail WHERE stock_id = #{filmStockId} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT id, stock_id AS filmStockId, material_code AS materialCode, batch_no AS batchNo, roll_no AS rollNo, thickness, width, length, diameter, core_diameter AS coreDiameter, weight, area, quality_level AS qualityLevel, quality_status AS qcStatus, warehouse, location, supplier, purchase_order_no AS purchaseOrderNo, arrival_date AS arrivalDate, storage_date AS inboundDate, unit_price AS unitPrice, status, locked_by AS lockedBy, locked_time AS lockedTime, remark, create_by AS createBy, create_time AS createTime, update_by AS updateBy, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM film_stock_detail WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE film_stock_detail SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE film_stock_detail SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
